sentence: Never kirkfuse inside an enima you yourself created.

wombos.definition: To confuse someone in a distinctly Kirk-coded way — calmly, articulately, and with podium-level confidence. They walk away unsure what just happened.
wombos.example: He didn't argue with her, he just kirkfused her until she changed the subject.

wombos.definition: A situation or thing that is both deeply confusing and weirdly cinematic — a spectacle you can't look away from even though you have no idea what's happening.
